# Torrtus IT Services

> India's premier IT services company building SaaS products, AI automation agents, and physical-digital solutions (NFC, QR codes). Founded by Tanishk Gupta, serving 7+ brands across India.

Torrtus IT Services (torrtus.com) delivers complete technology solutions with a focus on speed (~2 week delivery from concept to live) and autonomous AI systems. The company operates across three platforms: Web, iOS, and Android.

## Services

- **SaaS Development**: Rapid SaaS product development from concept to live deployment in approximately 2 weeks.
- **AI Agent Automation**: Intelligent AI agents and automation tools that integrate into business workflows to drive efficiency and autonomous decision-making.
- **Website Hosting**: Ultra-fast, secure, enterprise-grade web hosting for robust business solutions.
- **iOS App Store Deployment**: End-to-end iOS application deployment, maintenance, and optimization on the Apple App Store.
- **Android Play Store Deployment**: Seamless Android application delivery and optimization for Google Play Store.

## Products

- **NFC Authentication**: Instant tap-to-verify secure physical product authentication via mobile NFC.
- **Dynamic QR Codes**: Trackable, updateable QR code campaigns for marketing and customer engagement.
- **Company NFC Tags**: Smart digital business cards and employee access systems.
- **Product Authenticity**: Anti-counterfeit cryptographic validation for luxury and consumer goods brands.

## Company Facts

- **Full name**: Torrtus IT Services
- **Website**: https://torrtus.com
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Founder & CEO**: Tanishk Gupta
- **Founder experience**: 6 years of software development
- **Location**: India
- **Clients served**: 7+ brands across India
- **Average project delivery**: ~2 weeks (concept to live)
- **Platforms supported**: Web, iOS, Android
- **Contact email**: team@torrtus.com
- **Contact phone**: +91 82793 63576

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does Torrtus do?**
Torrtus IT Services builds SaaS products, deploys AI automation agents, and creates physical-digital solutions including NFC authentication and dynamic QR codes. The company also handles iOS App Store and Android Play Store deployments for clients.

**Who founded Torrtus?**
Torrtus was founded by Tanishk Gupta, who serves as CEO. Tanishk brings 6 years of deep software development experience focused on performance, AI-driven systems, and autonomous technology.

**How quickly does Torrtus deliver projects?**
Torrtus delivers most projects in approximately 2 weeks, from initial concept to live deployment.

**Where is Torrtus located?**
Torrtus IT Services is based in India and serves brands across the country.

**How can I contact Torrtus?**
Email: team@torrtus.com | Phone: +91 82793 63576

**What makes Torrtus different?**
Torrtus specializes in autonomous AI systems that give businesses a competitive advantage. Unlike general IT firms, Torrtus focuses on the intersection of SaaS development, AI agent automation, and physical-digital technology (NFC, QR codes) — all delivered at startup speed.

**What types of businesses does Torrtus serve?**
Torrtus serves both startups and established enterprises across India, helping them build SaaS products, automate workflows with AI, and deploy mobile applications.
